sections.section: 1. Woman with the Issue of Blood — She Reached Immediately

verses.text: When she heard about Jesus, she came behind Him in the crowd and touched His garment. For she said, 'If only I may touch His clothes, I shall be made well.' Immediately the fountain of her blood was dried up, and she felt in her body that she was healed of the affliction.
highlights: she came behind Him in the crowd and touched His garment
Immediately the fountain of her blood was dried up
she was healed of the affliction

sections.section: 2. Centurion — He Wanted Immediate Healing by One Word

verses.text: The centurion answered and said, 'Lord, I am not worthy that You should come under my roof. But only speak a word, and my servant will be healed.'
highlights: only speak a word
my servant will be healed

sections.section: 3. Canaanite / Syrophoenician Woman — She Came Without Delay

verses.text: And behold, a woman of Canaan came from that region and cried out to Him, saying, 'Have mercy on me, O Lord, Son of David! My daughter is severely demon-possessed.'
highlights: came from that region and cried out to Him
Have mercy on me, O Lord, Son of David

sections.section: 1. God's Power Is Greater Than My Sin

verses.text: Moreover the law entered that the offense might abound. But where sin abounded, grace abounded much more, so that as sin reigned in death, even so grace might reign through righteousness to eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord.
highlights: where sin abounded, grace abounded much more
grace might reign through righteousness to eternal life

verses.text: For she said, 'If only I may touch His clothes, I shall be made well.'
highlights: If only I may touch His clothes
I shall be made well

verses.text: And she said, 'Yes, Lord, yet even the little dogs eat the crumbs which fall from their masters' table.' Then Jesus answered and said to her, 'O woman, great is your faith! Let it be to you as you desire.' And her daughter was healed from that very hour.
highlights: even the little dogs eat the crumbs
great is your faith
her daughter was healed from that very hour

verses.text: The centurion answered and said, 'Lord, I am not worthy that You should come under my roof. But only speak a word, and my servant will be healed.'
highlights: only speak a word
my servant will be healed

verses.text: But Jesus said, 'Somebody touched Me, for I perceived power going out from Me.'
highlights: Somebody touched Me
power going out from Me

sections.section: 1. They Knew His Heart Is Fatherly

verses.text: If you then, being evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your Father who is in heaven give good things to those who ask Him!
highlights: your Father who is in heaven
give good things to those who ask Him

verses.text: And when Jesus went out He saw a great multitude; and He was moved with compassion for them, and healed their sick.
highlights: moved with compassion for them
healed their sick

verses.text: Then Jesus answered and said to her, 'O woman, great is your faith! Let it be to you as you desire.' And her daughter was healed from that very hour.
highlights: great is your faith
Let it be to you as you desire
her daughter was healed from that very hour

sections.section: 4. Fatherly Heart Wants His Children to Take Authority

verses.text: Behold, I give you the authority to trample on serpents and scorpions, and over all the power of the enemy, and nothing shall by any means hurt you.
highlights: I give you the authority
over all the power of the enemy
nothing shall by any means hurt you

sections.section: 5. Fatherly Heart Wants His Children to Claim Their Blessing

verses.text: And from the days of John the Baptist until now the kingdom of heaven suffers violence, and the violent take it by force.
highlights: the kingdom of heaven suffers violence
the violent take it by force

sections.section: 1. Woman with the Issue of Blood Heard About Jesus

verses.text: When she heard about Jesus, she came behind Him in the crowd and touched His garment.
highlights: she heard about Jesus
she came behind Him in the crowd and touched His garment

verses.text: So when he heard about Jesus, he sent elders of the Jews to Him, pleading with Him to come and heal his servant.
highlights: he heard about Jesus
pleading with Him to come and heal his servant

verses.text: For a woman whose young daughter had an unclean spirit heard about Him, and she came and fell at His feet.
highlights: heard about Him
she came and fell at His feet

verses.text: So then faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of God.
highlights: faith comes by hearing
hearing by the word of God

verses.text: When Jesus heard it, He marveled, and said to those who followed, 'Assuredly, I say to you, I have not found such great faith, not even in Israel!'
highlights: I have not found such great faith
not even in Israel

verses.text: Then Jesus answered and said to her, 'O woman, great is your faith! Let it be to you as you desire.' And her daughter was healed from that very hour.
highlights: great is your faith
her daughter was healed from that very hour

verses.text: For I am not ashamed of the gospel of Christ, for it is the power of God to salvation for everyone who believes, for the Jew first and also for the Greek. For in it the righteousness of God is revealed from faith to faith; as it is written, 'The just shall live by faith.'
highlights: it is the power of God to salvation for everyone who believes
the righteousness of God is revealed from faith to faith
The just shall live by faith

sections.section: Against the Law / Against the Norm
1. Woman with Issue of Blood Was Unclean Under the Law

verses.text: If a woman has a discharge of blood for many days, other than at the time of her customary impurity, or if it runs beyond her usual time of impurity, all the days of her unclean discharge shall be as the days of her customary impurity. She shall be unclean.
highlights: all the days of her unclean discharge
She shall be unclean

verses.text: Whoever touches those things shall be unclean; he shall wash his clothes and bathe in water, and be unclean until evening.
highlights: Whoever touches those things shall be unclean

sections.section: 3. Gentile Healing Before the Cross Went Against Common Expectation

verses.text: When Jesus heard it, He marveled, and said to those who followed, 'Assuredly, I say to you, I have not found such great faith, not even in Israel! And I say to you that many will come from east and west, and sit down with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob in the kingdom of heaven.'
highlights: I have not found such great faith, not even in Israel
many will come from east and west
sit down with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob in the kingdom of heaven

verses.text: For I am not ashamed of the gospel of Christ, for it is the power of God to salvation for everyone who believes, for the Jew first and also for the Greek.
highlights: the power of God to salvation for everyone who believes
for the Jew first and also for the Greek

sections.section: They Stopped Jesus / They Would Not Be Denied
1. Woman with the Issue of Blood Stopped Him

verses.text: Came from behind and touched the border of His garment. And immediately her flow of blood stopped. And Jesus said, 'Who touched Me?' When all denied it, Peter and those with him said, 'Master, the multitudes throng and press You, and You say, "Who touched Me?"'
highlights: touched the border of His garment
immediately her flow of blood stopped
Who touched Me?

verses.text: But He answered her not a word. And His disciples came and urged Him, saying, 'Send her away, for she cries out after us.' But He answered and said, 'I was not sent except to the lost sheep of the house of Israel.' Then she came and worshiped Him, saying, 'Lord, help me!'
highlights: He answered her not a word
she cries out after us
she came and worshiped Him

verses.text: But He answered and said, 'It is not good to take the children's bread and throw it to the little dogs.' And she said, 'Yes, Lord, yet even the little dogs eat the crumbs which fall from their masters' table.' Then Jesus answered and said to her, 'O woman, great is your faith! Let it be to you as you desire.' And her daughter was healed from that very hour.
highlights: even the little dogs eat the crumbs
great is your faith
her daughter was healed from that very hour

verses.text: Then Jesus said to the centurion, 'Go your way; and as you have believed, so let it be done for you.' And his servant was healed that same hour.
highlights: as you have believed, so let it be done for you
his servant was healed that same hour
